recentTweets.text:
Critical minerals are in everyday items Americans use—from cell phones and computers to hybrids and EVs. 

In @EnergyCommerce, we're working to ensure we recycle responsibly and consider public health as we develop a national strategy for recovering these materials on U.S. soil. https://t.co/XjUwAKKP2G

Twice a year, Floridians are forced to change the clocks, disrupting our lives, families, and local businesses. 

That’s why I wrote the Sunshine Protection Act back in 2013 to end these changes. This week, we FINALLY had a vote in Congress. https://t.co/mQ1ND2WD5O
Tariffs continue to raise prices. Food, gas, housing and healthcare are all going up. Time to end the tariffs now. https://t.co/K11DVJONJq
What a terrible and avoidable tragedy. Our prayers go out to the family for their loss.

Lastly, we visited Compare Foods Supermarket in Kissimmee to discuss how rising costs are affecting local businesses & the families they serve.

Hearing directly from business owners reinforces the importance of supporting the small businesses that keep our local economy strong. https://t.co/JOSrBxnYxo

Our next stop was MG Medical Center in Kissimmee to discuss the accessible care they provide and how recent healthcare cuts may be impacting local providers.

We’re committed to supporting the healthcare services families rely on every day. https://t.co/vvmfXgsNLd

🧵 Kissimmee & St. Cloud Small Business Tour!

First stop was Pharmacy Prescriptions Unlimited in St. Cloud to discuss the importance of keeping prescription medications and vaccines accessible and affordable.

We’re proud to support our local pharmacies that provide essential, https://t.co/IorXbaWFjQ

Over 2 million Floridians have lost their healthcare due to Congress’ ACA and Medicaid cuts. 

These cuts are having deadly consequences for constituents like the Blackman Family, and must be reversed. https://t.co/cKpPf4Namk

Our condolences go out to the family of the late US Senator Lindsey Graham. He was a true dealmaker, happy warrior and strong advocate for foreign alliances including Ukraine. Rest in peace Senator.  https://t.co/GUBFYP7Sr4

Joined Renuevo Community Alliance for a food distribution serving families in BVL & beyond. Proud to have secured federal funding for @feedhopenow to support food banks across our region.

As families continue to face rising costs, we’re grateful for organizations like Renuevo & https://t.co/Lc8LVmV2bB

UPDATE: 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act becomes law without the President’s signature.

Making housing more affordable for millions of Americans should be a priority in Washington.

Attended @UCFDowntown 2026 Orlando Supplier Development Exchange where small businesses connected with local, state, & federal government buyers.

Events like these help entrepreneurs explore govt. contracting opportunities, build valuable partnerships, & strengthen Central https://t.co/RhGPwVmEmL

In @EnergyCommerce, we discussed the importance of investing in AI, semiconductors, & robotics to strengthen America's global competitiveness.

As we make those investments, we must also ensure that decisions about data center development remain in the hands of local communities. https://t.co/V7YM6Juj9f
RT @ALZIMPACT: Thank you @RepDarrenSoto for giving those impacted by dementia #MoreTime by urging cosponsoring the bipartisan #ASAPAct. Lik…

In @Energycommerce, we called out unnecessary delay & emphasized the importance of expanding broadband access in rural communities.

Reliable internet connectivity is critical for our small biz, farmers, & families, & we will keep working to expand access both in Florida & across https://t.co/4eFCKnkQ44

Proud to deliver 3 major upgrades for @FlyKissimmee!

We’ve helped secure over $20M for a new air traffic control tower, customs service for international flights, and taxiway rehab. These projects will boost local jobs, small businesses, and air travel. 🛩️ https://t.co/TdAWRYqsrT

Grateful to join Embrace Families at Main Street High School's Community Food Distribution event. It’s an honor to be part of a community that makes a difference.

We will continue to work with our federally funded @feedhopenow to ensure that no family goes hungry in Central https://t.co/9wWNgqpHCf

Met with @FlaFruitandVeg & @IntFreshProduce to discuss the challenges facing our growers, including tariffs, labor shortages, rising costs, & recent freezes. 

Central Florida’s farmers are vital to our economy, & I’ll keep working to support our agriculture & fresh produce https://t.co/HbfGQiWNqm
More pics! https://t.co/mQSURzkPyT

Last night we ended our America’s 250th Anniversary with a bang!

Our band @AstromaxMusic performed at @CityofKissimmee’s Monumental 4th of July Celebration. God bless America! 🇺🇸 🎆 🎸 https://t.co/sKdaDpX8H9

Back in the district, I visited Buen Vecino, an affordable housing community for seniors that we helped secure $5.6M to support. Seeing firsthand the impact it's made is a powerful reminder of why we must continue fighting for housing solutions that strengthen our communities. https://t.co/RQ8cM3zjYK

In Washington, I joined colleagues for a bipartisan press conference focused on lowering housing costs & expanding access to affordable housing, & we urged President Trump to stop his unrelated demands & sign the bill into law. It's time to help families achieve the dream of https://t.co/AhQ5AmKxHO
More pics! https://t.co/lo1IqiPRHg

Today we celebrate America’s 250th Anniversary! Proud to share this momentous day with constituents in Lake Nona and Celebration this morning.

Our country has come a long way since the Revolutionary War. Today we remember our freedom, democracy and shared history! 🇺🇸 🎆 https://t.co/CWjuc7cW3l

#America250: We're proud to celebrate Osceola's rich Native American and ranching heritage. 

Throughout my time in Congress, I've worked to protect that legacy by standing up for our local ranchers and securing the support they deserve. https://t.co/UYs4GB6o4t

Great to meet with Brian Hughes, the new Center Director of @NASAKennedy.

KSC serves as NASA’s premier launch facility and has played a central role in major missions, like @NASAArtemis and Nancy Grace Roman Telescope, that are shaping the future of space exploration. https://t.co/CeiCMvnobh

We were recently briefed by the State Dept. on U.S. rescue & humanitarian efforts in response to the recent Venezuela earthquakes. Our joint efforts have helped ensure over $200M to support this emergency work. (Photo: @Southcom)

For updates and ways to help ⬇️ https://t.co/4uflmODJgP

Another weak jobs report. The economy continues to slow because of inflation, tariffs, the Iran War, and more.

So much of this was avoidable. Congress needs to step up to address these issues.
#America250: From its days along the historic Dixie Highway to today’s bustling tourism corridor, Loughman remains an integral part of Central Florida’s past and present. https://t.co/wQAlEOyqYM

Congrats to @USMNT on another BIG WIN at @FIFAWorldCup!!!

Good luck against Belgium. We are so proud of you all! 🇺🇸 ⚽️ https://t.co/r67YbwkznE

In the @energycommerce Environment Subcommittee, we recently discussed bipartisan efforts to strengthen America’s supply chain for critical minerals.

This is essential to expanding electric-vehicle and hybrid-battery recycling infrastructure. https://t.co/eaqyvQXpIJ

.@flyKissimmee will soon be going international! ✈️ 

Our work together to secure a Customs Office finally paid off. Add in $10M we just got for a new tower, and BIG things are happening for our local airport!

Thank you to nearly 10,000 constituents who joined our Lowering Costs Tele-Town Hall.

We will continue fighting to lower everyday costs and make life more affordable for families in Central Florida and across the nation. https://t.co/rVejNFh8Ml

#America250: From its origins as the trading post of Allendale, Kissimmee has become a vibrant city with thriving small businesses and a vibrant Puerto Rican Hispanic community. https://t.co/wTw9hBxrFB

🚨HAPPENING NOW! Don't miss our tele-town hall, where we'll discuss lowering costs and improving affordability for families. 

⬇️
https://t.co/rMTnVhZJ9J

🚨LOWERING COSTS TELE-TOWN HALL TODAY: Don't miss our tele-town hall TODAY, Tuesday, June 30, at 6:30 p.m., where we'll discuss lowering costs and improving affordability for families.

Watch live ⬇️
https://t.co/rMTnVhZJ9J https://t.co/DKR9e8nzOo

The U.S. Supreme Court wisely upholds birthright citizenship today, striking down this unlawful executive order.

The 14th Amendment is as enforceable now as it was when ratified on July 9, 1868. Millions of Americans can rest easier knowing their citizenship can’t be stolen by
#America250: Today, we celebrate the resilience and legacy of the Whitted Community, one of Osceola's historic Black neighborhoods. https://t.co/Pn6TswM0lI

Proud to stand with @HispanicCaucus in calling for a surge in aid to provide humanitarian assistance, rescue operations, and other support to Venezuela following the earthquakes.

The U.S. must assist and reinstate Venezuela's TPS protections to help the diaspora here. 🇺🇸🇻🇪 https://t.co/2ABl9wFJyr

Now the @FTC will ping pong back and forth with every new administration. This will weaken protections for consumers and lead to inconsistent enforcement against businesses. Neither is good for long term prosperity. https://t.co/4aZ5HjTGz8

#America250: We celebrate the Union soldiers who served the country and later founded the City of St. Cloud, laying the foundation for one of the fastest-growing cities in the region. https://t.co/eak8J1lYtC
#America250: From an Army Fort to Orlando’s first county seat to a lively neighborhood, Fort Gatlin remains an integral part of Orlando’s history. https://t.co/hSDOgBKvkw

We are honored to host @FIFAWorldCup in Florida! 

Thrilled to attend the Colombia v Portugal game today to show our support. #FIFAWorldCup 🇺🇸 ⚽️ https://t.co/6AzKdaypbT
#America250: From Orlando’s first brick road to a bustling neighborhood, today we celebrate the historic Conway area! https://t.co/MYybcYwp0g

Deeply saddened to hear about the passing of my dear friend Danny Ramos.

He was a champion of small businesses, a prolific host of SpeakOut TV, and a strong voice for the Puerto Rican/Hispanic community in Central Florida. He will be dearly missed. 🕊️🙏🏽 https://t.co/vMaAuHUGJo

Thrilled to connect with @CamaraPR at their "Puerto Rico is Open for Business" event in Washington this week.

We discussed healthcare, trade, manufacturing, and other ways to uplift Central Florida businesses and those back on the Island. 🇺🇸🇵🇷 https://t.co/puobwqNEa8

The Supreme Court’s attack on Haiti TPS will tear apart local families, hurt small biz and create a healthcare worker shortage. @HouseDemocrats already passed a Haiti TPS extension. Time for the Senate to do the same. https://t.co/lvZJnIzJQk

We are praying for those affected by these twin earthquakes in Venezuela. It is critical for the US to assist with their recovery and reinstitute Venezuela TPS to help the diaspora here.  https://t.co/X3vBul7Hos

The federal response to the screwworm epidemic has been slow due to DOGE cuts in the fly sterilization program and staff.

As this issue continues hurting Florida cattle country, I joined @NewDemCoalition in sending a letter to USDA demanding a strategy update. https://t.co/SuE1VOWrrr

UPDATE: Housing costs are a HUGE issue in Florida. This bill is a bipartisan bright spot in an unproductive Congress.

Yet Pres Trump has decided to block it for unrelated demands.

I hear from many families trying to buy their 1st home. It’s time to help them.

Affordable housing is a major concern for Central Florida. Grateful to vote for bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act to lower housing costs.
🏡 Limits corp investors buying homes,
🌴 Streamlines enviro reviews & 
🏗️ Speeds up construction process.  https://t.co/SgyyT9tkCg
More info ⬇️ https://t.co/EItZ43vJyP

🚨ICYMI: We secured $43 MILLION in @FAANews funding for @MCO and @flyKissimmee thanks to the Infrastructure Law. 

✈️$33M to modernize facilities at MCO
🛩️$10M for a new air traffic control tower at ISM

We will continue to invest in Central Florida’s world-class airports. https://t.co/kvFJLxf79P

A staggering 2 MILLION Floridians lost their health insurance this year due ACA and Medicaid cuts. Private plans have also spiked as a result.

It’s time for Congress to come together and protect our healthcare.

During #CoffeeWithTheCongressman, local farmers & agricultural leaders highlighted key challenges facing agriculture, including rising equipment & labor costs, screwworm concerns, & citrus greening.

These conversations help ensure Central Florida farmers have the support they https://t.co/Cv6OCRhI8r

Wishing a Happy Father’s Day to all the dads across Central Florida. Thinking of my dad Lou who we lost a few years ago.

Thanks for helping raise America’s future! https://t.co/nXu3PQleX7
Congrats to @USMNT for their incredible shutout WIN against Australia. Let’s keep it going USA! 🇺🇸 ⚽️

The labor community lost a force over the weekend. Bobby Knost was a fierce advocate for the Ironworkers Local 808 and an incredible person with a larger-than-life personality. While we dearly miss him, his legacy will live on in our work to strengthen labor protections. https://t.co/lgn69gxlbk
I look forward to honoring Bobby by entering his biography into the Congressional Record.

This Puerto Rico water shortage is unacceptable. Many lives are at risk.

We need @fema, @USACEHQ and other federal agencies to help island officials restore this struggling system.

kurdistanMentions.text:
Inflation reaches a 3 YEAR HIGH surging to 4.2% in May. This is crippling Central Florida families.

It’s fueled by tariffs and rising energy costs. Meanwhile Congress does nothing to address these concerns. 
https://t.co/owzz3wdN4D https://t.co/HJl8snPzpG
